description: Discipline/accountability conditions for AMBIGUOUS incidents. Severity reuses the score readout; sanction_level uses the discrete-increment readout over an ORDERED 4-tier scale (Coaching<Warning<PIP<Termination) -> EV ordinal severity + modal sanction + exact-match; escalation reuses the binary readout. SENSITIVE.

prompt_conditions.instruction: On a scale from 0 to 100, how severe is this incident? 0 = trivial / no action warranted, 100 = most severe.

prompt_conditions.instruction_frame: Decide the most appropriate response to this incident.

prompt_conditions.instruction: Should this incident be escalated to HR? Answer with a single word: Yes or No.
